orders.description: Sales orders table containing transaction data

product.description: Product name (Laptop, Phone, Tablet, Monitor, Keyboard, Mouse, Headphones, Speaker)

revenue.description: Revenue amount in USD (floating point number)

sample_queries: SELECT region, SUM(revenue) FROM orders GROUP BY region
SELECT product, AVG(revenue) FROM orders GROUP BY product
SELECT region, COUNT(*) FROM customers GROUP BY region

relationships.description: Orders and customers can be joined on region to analyze customer behavior by region
relationships.join_example: SELECT o.region, COUNT(o.id) as orders, COUNT(c.id) as customers FROM orders o LEFT JOIN customers c ON o.region = c.region GROUP BY o.region

query_guidelines: Always include table aliases for joins
Use SUM(), AVG(), COUNT(), MAX(), MIN() for aggregations
Use GROUP BY for categorical analysis
Use ORDER BY for sorting results
